name: wolvenkit-mcp
description: MCP server for Cyberpunk 2077 modding — exposes the WolvenKit toolkit (.archive archives, CR2W/JSON, TweakDB, REDmod, .reds scripts, audio, mesh/texture/animation) as tools usable by an agent.
long_description: C#/.NET 8 MCP server backed by a persistent WolvenKit daemon (pipelined IPC) with cp77tools fallback. 128 tools: archive read/write, CR2W↔JSON conversion, structured TweakDB editing, .archive and REDmod packaging, .cpmodproj project generation, mesh/texture/animation/morphtarget/mlmask export, opus audio extraction, REDscript (dedicated parser) and TweakXL linting, mod diagnostics (mod_doctor, diagnose_logs, analyze_conflicts, validate_item_mod), backup/restore, in-game iteration loop (launch + tail logs) and live in-game bridge via the CETBridge mod (36 live_* tools: player state, inventory, teleport, live TweakDB, quest facts, event observation). Windows only (native cp77tools).

cli_timeout_seconds.title: Max delay per command (s)
cli_timeout_seconds.description: Value of WOLVENKIT_CLI_TIMEOUT_SECONDS (default 300). Long verbs (uncook, build) have their own higher cap.

cet_tcp_port.title: CETBridge TCP port
cet_tcp_port.description: Local listening port for the CETBridge mod (live_* tools, default 27010).

cet_bridge_timeout_ms.title: Live bridge timeout (ms)
cet_bridge_timeout_ms.description: Max delay of a live_* request to the game (default 5000 ms).
